title: Death Tarot Totem
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with the Death Tarot card from Persona.
body:
A small resource pack that changes the Totem of Undying into the Death tarot card from Persona 3 and 4. It also changes the name of the item to "Death Tarot".

This pack is compatible with all 1.20 and 1.21 versions.
